prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-GPESSENTIALSKIT-17PC Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 16pc Gold Prospecting Equipment Field Kit with Classifier Screens Description: Hit the field with confidence using the ASR Outdoor 16pc Gold Prospecting Equipment Kit: a field ready gold panning kit designed to cover all the basics for successful gold panning. Whether you're exploring remote creeks, or visiting a favorite claim site, this kit includes durable, reliable gold prospecting equipment to help you classify, pan and recover gold.

Here’s what’s included:

Classifier Screens (Multiple Sizes): Speed up your panning process with lightweight, stackable screens that separate larger rocks and debris from finer material, ideal for high efficiency prospecting

Gold Pans: Choose from three different gold pans that give you variety when panning, including a made in USA 11 inch multi wall gold pan, a 12 inch dual riffle gold pan with both deep and shallow riffles, and lastly, a large 14 inch single riffle pan with built in water guide

16lb Magnetic Pick Up Tool: Remove unwanted magnetic black sand from concentrates quickly, lightweight and perfect for field use

3-in-1 Shovel: Compact yet rugged, this digging tool is ready to tackle any terrain, whether breaking hard ground, scooping gravel or digging into riverbanks

Fine Gold Recovery Tools: Everything you need to help recover and store even the tiniest specs of gold with ease

Perfect for all levels of prospectors, or anyone looking to get their hands dirty in this challenging but rewarding hobby, this gold panning kit has all the gold prospecting equipment needed to get you in the game fast. Just add water, dirt and let the gold rush begin. Good luck! Search Terms: Gold panning kit; gold prospecting equipment; gold rush; gold mining equipment; hand tools; soil sifter; gold pans; sieve; outdoor gear; camping supplies; gold panning kit for adults; paydirt; sluice box; classifier screen; gold prospecting kit Features: - GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: This gold panning kit covers all the basics and gear needed to collect, classify and pan for gold in the field; this kit includes 3 gold pans, 3 large classifiers, a 16lb magnetic pick up tool, 3 in 1 shovel and assorted fine gold recovery tools - CLASSIFIER SCREEN SET: Ideal for removing unwanted materials like gravels and rocks from your paydirt to increase gold yield; this set includes four large stacking classifier screens in 1/4 inch, 1/8, and 1/12 inch mesh sizes - GOLD PANS: This gold panning kit comes with three different gold pans, giving you the variety needed, depending on your sample size and stage of paydirt; choose from an 11 inch made in USA multi wall pan, a 12 inch dual riffle pan or large 14 inch single riffle pan - 16LB BLACK SAND MAGNETIC SEPARATOR: Remove unwanted magnetic black sand from concentrates quickly, this pick up tool is easy to use, quick and efficient, helping you get to the gold faster - FINE GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS: Included are a pair of tweezers, eye loupe, 4oz collection bottle and more to help with the extraction and storage of found gold === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 16pc Gold Prospecting Equipment Field Kit

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 16-pc Gold Prospecting Equipment Field Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 3 Gold Pans, Classifier Screens, Magnetic Separator, 3-In-1 Shovel, Fine Gold Recovery Tools

openai.title_differentiation: Three Gold Pans, Four Stackable Classifier Screens, 16Lb Black Sand Magnet, 3-In-1 Shovel, Fine Gold Recovery Tools
